title: chrysocoma puberula
intro: Chrysocoma puberula, also known as the "bushveld tea", is a shrub-like perennial plant native to southern Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chrysocoma puberula include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Chrysocoma puberula can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, or it can be used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
